tasks.title: Implement accountless role-based share links
tasks.desc: Added owner/editor/viewer invite links with high-entropy tokens stored hashed server-side. No accounts, email verification, or OAuth are required.

tasks.title: Add optional password-protected join flow
tasks.desc: Added optional roadmap password protection so collaborators need both invite link and password when enabled.

tasks.title: Protect roadmap reads and writes with participant sessions
tasks.desc: Required valid Bearer session tokens for saved roadmap access and enforced role-based permissions for owner/editor/viewer actions.

tasks.title: Implement scoped browser auth and roadmap switcher identity
tasks.desc: Stored auth per roadmap in browser storage and kept active roadmap selection isolated so sessions for different roadmaps do not overwrite each other.

tasks.title: Build owner-only Share modal lifecycle
tasks.desc: Implemented owner-only share management with role rows, fresh link display only after generate/rotate, copy feedback, link state, and owner access guidance.

tasks.title: Add share-link rotate, revoke, and regenerate behavior
tasks.desc: Separated invite-link lifecycle from participant sessions: revoking a link blocks future joins but does not kick existing participants.

tasks.title: Track which invite link each participant used
tasks.desc: Added participant share_link_id tracking, safe access metadata, legacy/unknown handling, and grouped Owner/Editor/Viewer access sections.

tasks.title: Add owner participant list and participant revoke
tasks.desc: Added owner-only participant list, safe metadata, current-session markers, participant revocation, revoked_at handling, and Activity labels.

tasks.title: Handle participant.revoked realtime event
tasks.desc: Added frontend handling for participant.revoked SSE so revoked users leave LIVE state, lose server auth, and keep only a local unsynced copy.

tasks.title: Handle roadmap.deleted realtime event
tasks.desc: Added frontend handling for roadmap.deleted SSE so collaborators are notified, server auth is cleared, and the cached copy becomes local/unsynced.

tasks.title: Set up RoadForge monorepo and app architecture
tasks.desc: Created the pnpm workspace with Next.js web app, FastAPI backend, PostgreSQL, Docker Compose, TypeScript, CSS/Tailwind styling, and shared roadmap domain structure.

tasks.title: Build local-first roadmap workspace
tasks.desc: Implemented the local workspace, wizard entry flow, roadmap context, phase/task rendering, optimistic editing, and browser persistence.

tasks.title: Define roadmap JSON data model
tasks.desc: Defined phases, tasks, descriptions, estimates, dependencies, subtasks via parentId, status, progress, colors, tags, next flags, and import/export constraints.

tasks.title: Build backend roadmap persistence
tasks.desc: Implemented saved roadmaps as full snapshots with ownership metadata, timestamps, password status, soft-delete support, and Alembic-backed PostgreSQL schema.

tasks.title: Create development lifecycle Makefile
tasks.desc: Added commands for start, stop, restart, reset, status, logs, API health, migrations, lint, typecheck, build, and frontend background process management.

tasks.title: Add blank/template roadmap creation flow
tasks.desc: Added creation flow support for blank roadmaps and starter/template roadmaps instead of relying on a single hardcoded sample.

tasks.title: Integrate RoadForge/ForgeApps branding foundation
tasks.desc: Added logo assets, favicons, manifest support, visual identity, browser title behavior, and base dark/light UI alignment.

tasks.title: Add GitHub Actions CI baseline
tasks.desc: Added CI on push and pull requests with the canonical frontend quality gate and a lightweight API syntax check.

tasks.title: Polish task expansion and interaction isolation
tasks.desc: Task rows expand via chevron rather than row-wide clicks, preventing accidental toggles from checkboxes, tags, buttons, and links.

tasks.title: Build task detail editor
tasks.desc: Added editing for title, description, estimate, tags, dependencies, subtasks, and task metadata with compact detail controls.

tasks.title: Add dependency-aware completion guards
tasks.desc: Prevented completing tasks while unfinished subtasks or dependencies remain, while keeping reopen actions unrestricted.

tasks.title: Add task search and phase auto-expand behavior
tasks.desc: Search filters tasks, auto-expands matching phases, and restores manual collapse state after clearing search.

tasks.title: Implement dnd-kit task drag-and-drop
tasks.desc: Added sortable task ordering with dnd-kit, drag handles, overlays, smooth movement, and persisted order.

tasks.title: Implement phase color editing with locks
tasks.desc: Added phase color presets, owner/editor-only editing, phase locks, self-lock handling, outside-click cleanup, and viewer read-only behavior.

tasks.title: Normalize phase progress from task state
tasks.desc: Added pure helpers to compute phase progress from completed tasks during load, import, mutation, sync, restore, and export.

tasks.title: Add phase drag-and-drop ordering
tasks.desc: Added dnd-kit phase ordering with a phase drag handle, disabled unsafe dragging while filtered, persisted order, and Activity summary support.

tasks.title: Style task filter dropdown to match RoadForge
tasks.desc: Replaced the native select with a compact custom dropdown, readable dark/light styling, active state, outside-click close, and Escape handling.

tasks.title: Improve workspace header, tab title, and favicon
tasks.desc: Removed redundant breadcrumb text, added shortened roadmap browser titles, aligned header controls, and added theme-aware favicon switching.

tasks.title: Improve mobile workspace responsiveness
tasks.desc: Improved mobile header, toolbar, panels, modals, phase cards, and 375px layout behavior without changing product logic.

tasks.title: Add first-class task assignees
tasks.desc: Added task.assignees as explicit metadata so tasks show Assigned rather than Owner, support no assignee, and allow multiple assignees.

tasks.title: Preserve legacy owner:/review: tag fallback
tasks.desc: Kept old roadmaps usable by reading owner:/review: tags as fallback assignees while hiding assignment metadata tags from normal tag display.

tasks.title: Add assignment editing in task detail
tasks.desc: Added compact multi-assignee editing, custom typed names, and explicit unassigned state.

tasks.title: Build Team panel
tasks.desc: Added Team panel with assigned tasks per person, done/open counts, unassigned tasks, and person-based filtering.

tasks.title: Add task filters
tasks.desc: Added All, My tasks, person, Pair, Next, Open, and Done filters integrated with search and assignment metadata.

tasks.title: Implement Activity panel
tasks.desc: Added backend activity logs and a frontend panel for roadmap events, participant events, task changes, imports, restores, and access events.

tasks.title: Add activity batching and anti-spam behavior
tasks.desc: Collapsed rapid toggles and repeated changes into meaningful final summaries so task completion/reopen and phase completion/reopen logs stay informative.

tasks.title: Refresh Activity panel after sync
tasks.desc: Added refresh key behavior so Activity updates after autosync/manual save when the panel is open, and fetches latest activity on open.

tasks.title: Add readable activity labels for new events
tasks.desc: Added user-facing labels for imported/restored roadmaps, participant revocation, phase reorder, batch changes, and legacy activity snapshots.

phases.name: Delivered Import, Export, and Version History

tasks.title: Finalize JSON-only roadmap import/export
tasks.desc: Made JSON the only true roadmap import/export format and removed stale Markdown/PDF/agent-bundle roadmap formats from active import/export behavior.

tasks.title: Add AI roadmap template export helper
tasks.desc: Added a plain-text helper template that users can give to an AI assistant to produce valid RoadForge JSON.

tasks.title: Densify Import/Export modal
tasks.desc: Reworked the modal into compact action rows with clearer descriptions and less empty space.

tasks.title: Add explicit import modes
tasks.desc: Added Replace current roadmap and Import as new local roadmap modes. Replace preserves server roadmap identity and sync; new local creates a separate draft.

tasks.title: Add import compatibility warnings
tasks.desc: Warns about older, future, or partially unsupported JSON without blocking import, and preserves legacy assignment fallback behavior.

tasks.title: Implement owner-only version history
tasks.desc: Added roadmap_versions table, owner-only version list/detail/restore endpoints, restore Activity, SSE broadcast, and max-100 retention.

tasks.title: Add manual checkpoints
tasks.desc: Added owner-only checkpoint creation in Versions so users can deliberately create restore points.

tasks.title: Refine version snapshot policy
tasks.desc: Stopped ordinary task ticks/edits from creating versions. Activity keeps detailed changes; Versions now track meaningful restore points.

tasks.title: Restore older roadmap versions safely
tasks.desc: Restore updates roadmap name/phases/timestamps locally, keeps collaboration state, broadcasts to collaborators, and creates a restored version entry.

tasks.title: Keep exported JSON normalized
tasks.desc: Ensured exported JSON contains normalized progress and current metadata so re-importing current exports avoids compatibility warnings.

phases.name: Delivered Sync, Realtime, and Data Safety

tasks.title: Add debounced autosync for server-backed roadmaps
tasks.desc: Server-backed owner/editor edits now autosync after a debounce and show LIVE/SYNCING/OFFLINE states instead of incorrectly becoming Local Only.

tasks.title: Harden API-unreachable behavior
tasks.desc: Cached roadmap data stays visible when the API is unavailable; network failures are not confused with revoked auth.

tasks.title: Prevent SSE overwrite of pending local edits
tasks.desc: Guarded realtime update application so incoming server snapshots do not silently discard unsynced local edits.

tasks.title: Add conflict recovery UI
tasks.desc: Added CONFLICT sync state, persistent banner, header Reload action, and reload-server-version recovery for 409 conflicts.

tasks.title: Preserve local copies after access loss or deletion
tasks.desc: When access is revoked or roadmap is deleted, server auth is cleared and the cached roadmap is converted to a local unsynced copy instead of wiping unrelated data.

tasks.title: Separate link revocation from participant revocation
tasks.desc: Clarified product behavior so link revoke prevents future joins, while user revoke removes an already-joined participant session.

tasks.title: Avoid exposing sensitive tokens
tasks.desc: Raw invite URLs are only visible immediately after generate/rotate, token hashes/session tokens are not exposed through participant/version/share APIs, and exports avoid auth cache data.

tasks.title: Update participant last_seen_at and datetime handling
tasks.desc: Updated participant last_seen_at during authenticated requests and coerced naive last_updated_at values to UTC before concurrency checks.

phases.name: Delivered Deployment, CI, and Documentation Readiness

tasks.title: Prepare Docker/Compose production deployment baseline
tasks.desc: Added production Docker/Compose deployment files, environment handling, persistent Postgres volume expectations, health checks, and server-oriented Make targets.

tasks.title: Add schema migrations for access, versions, and share tracking
tasks.desc: Added migrations for participant revocation, roadmap versions, and participant share-link tracking.

tasks.title: Document single-worker realtime constraint
tasks.desc: Made --workers 1 explicit and documented that locks, event tickets, and SSE event bus are in-memory until a Redis-backed architecture exists.

tasks.title: Document schema-sensitive deployment flow
tasks.desc: Documented update/migrate/status flow and warned that releases with Alembic files require migrations immediately after deploy.

tasks.title: Add GitHub Actions validation gate
tasks.desc: Added CI with make check for frontend lint/typecheck/build and a lightweight Python compileall API syntax job.

tasks.title: Refresh README and backend API docs
tasks.desc: Updated README and docs/backend-api.md to match current features, endpoints, limitations, activity UI, deployment caveats, and manual QA status.

tasks.desc: Created docs/manual-qa.md covering all major collaboration, import/export, versioning, activity, mobile, deployment, and security flows.

tasks.title: Audit stale project docs

tasks.title: Set up reusable Claude Code agents, skills, and safety hook

tasks.desc: Added make diff for status, diff stats, tracked diffs, and untracked file diffs so review output can be pasted cleanly during slice-based work.

tasks.desc: Moved task ID generation and dependency cycle detection into lib/task-graph.ts as pure helpers while keeping Workspace behavior unchanged.

tasks.desc: Moved debounced server autosync state, refs, status derivation, and conflict/offline handling from Workspace into useAutoSync while preserving save timing and behavior.

tasks.title: Extract shared edit-lock hook
tasks.desc: Moved shared acquire, refresh, release, and ownership tracking logic from phase color editing and task editing into useEditLock without changing lock timing or UI behavior.

tasks.desc: Replaced the inline delete confirmation overlay in RoadmapSwitcher with the shared Modal component while preserving server delete, local draft remove, and browser-cache remove flows.

tasks.desc: Moved identical post-join storage writes into lib/join-flow.ts while leaving caller-specific context updates, roadmap fetches, upgrade behavior, UI resets, and redirects in place.

tasks.title: Extract task edit form component
tasks.desc: Moved task edit draft state, assignee editing, save normalization, and edit form markup from TaskRow into a focused TaskEditForm component.

tasks.title: Extract task detail metadata component
tasks.desc: Moved task description, estimate, assigned users, tags, and deterministic tag color display from TaskRow into a focused TaskDetailMeta component.

tasks.title: Remove no-op Add phase button

tasks.title: Extract task completion guard from Workspace
tasks.desc: Move the unfinished-subtask, unfinished-dependency, and missing-dependency checks out of Workspace into a small pure helper while keeping toast messages and mutation behavior unchanged.

tasks.title: Extract workspace participants loading hook
tasks.desc: Move owner-only participant loading, loading state, error state, and refresh behavior from Workspace into a focused hook without changing participant revoke or Team panel behavior.

tasks.title: Extract RoadmapSwitcher item component
tasks.desc: Move one cached roadmap row, role/local badges, delete/remove button, and active-state display from RoadmapSwitcher into a focused RoadmapSwitcherItem component.

tasks.title: Extract RoadmapSwitcher invite form
tasks.desc: Move the invite-link/password form markup and local input reset behavior out of RoadmapSwitcher while keeping the actual join submit flow in the parent for now.

tasks.title: Move RoadmapSwitcher dropdown inline styles to CSS
tasks.desc: Replace large inline style objects in the switcher dropdown with ownership-based CSS classes while preserving layout, cascade, and visual behavior.

tasks.title: Extract import notice component from IOModal
tasks.desc: Move pending import repairs, warnings, and upgrade notice rendering from IOModal into a focused ImportNotice component without changing import confirmation behavior.

tasks.title: Move AI roadmap template out of IOModal
tasks.desc: Move the large AI roadmap template string into a dedicated lib/template file so IOModal stays focused on modal state and user actions.

tasks.title: Extract ParticipantRow from ShareModal
tasks.desc: Moved participant row rendering, current-session badge, role badge, joined/last-seen metadata, and revoke button markup out of ShareModal.

tasks.title: Extract ShareRoleSection from ShareModal
tasks.desc: Moved each Owner/Editor/Viewer share-link section into a focused component while preserving link copy, rotate, revoke, participant grouping, and participant-role badge behavior.

tasks.title: Remove dead workspace header styles
tasks.desc: Deleted obsolete breadcrumb, status badge, badge variant, and badge animation CSS after those elements were removed from the workspace header.

tasks.title: Refactor workspace header into named zones
tasks.desc: Replaced spacer/order/grid header layout with explicit header-start and header-end zones and restored the roadmap name beside the brand.

tasks.desc: Removed duplicate cloud/share header action, kept the primary Save/Reload/Retry/Share/Create-your-own button flow, strengthened roadmap-name styling, and removed the unused AppHeader displayName prop.

tasks.title: Centralize workspace toast handling
tasks.desc: Threaded a Workspace-owned onToast callback through Phase and TaskRow so Workspace renders a single Toast instance and phase/task lock conflicts no longer risk overlapping toasts.

tasks.desc: Added toolbar-start and toolbar-end zones so roadmap controls and Activity/Versions actions have clear ownership and right-side anchoring.

tasks.desc: Replaced misleading .collapse-all usage on Activity, Versions, and toolbar actions with clearer toolbar-action styling while preserving behavior.

tasks.desc: Moved disabled checkbox cursor/opacity and lock pill color/background from TaskRow inline styles into task-row CSS state classes.

tasks.title: Clean stale workspace selectors and comments

tasks.desc: Delete comment-only/stub CSS files that are no longer imported, such as workspace.css, workspace-roadmap.css, and workspace-shell.css, after confirming no active imports or rules remain.

tasks.desc: Replace window.confirm usage for version restore and destructive revoke/remove flows with app-styled confirmation UI so the experience is consistent, brand-safe, and not dependent on native browser dialogs.

tasks.title: Fix phase numbering after phase reorder
tasks.desc: Fix phase numbering so dragged/reordered phases are renumbered consistently in one-based display order and persisted correctly after reorder/import/export.

tasks.desc: Map RoadmapContext responsibilities into hydration/storage, server sync, realtime/SSE, access-loss handling, and public setter concerns before moving code. This is a focused code/review audit; broad manual QA is deferred to the final QA phase.

tasks.title: Split RoadmapContext hydration and storage lifecycle

Overall frontend architecture improved to 8.5/10, Workspace to 8/10, RoadmapContext to 9/10, and no architecture blockers remained before hardening/rebrand work.
