phases.name: Delivered Data, Realtime, and Security Planning

tasks.title: Design relational roadmap task schema migration plan
tasks.desc: Documented the staged migration plan from JSONB roadmap snapshots toward relational phase/task projection, keeping snapshots canonical first to preserve import/export, versions, activity, and rollback safety.

tasks.title: Design session expiry and revocation policy
tasks.desc: Documented the accountless session policy: 30-day sliding participant sessions, expired-vs-revoked semantics, local cache preservation, API behavior, frontend UX, and staged implementation phases.

tasks.title: Design rate limiting policy
tasks.desc: Documented rate limiting for join/password-sensitive endpoints, roadmap creation, event tickets, and owner share actions, recommending an in-memory FastAPI limiter first and Redis-backed storage later.

tasks.title: Design CSP and strict security headers policy
tasks.desc: Documented the security headers policy, staged CSP Report-Only rollout, API/proxy/header ownership, SSE-compatible connect-src requirements, and manual QA path before enforcement.

tasks.title: Update roadmap with full hardening and rebrand sequence
tasks.desc: Updated the project roadmap so planning documents are separated from implementation, hardening work runs before rebrand, and manual QA only resumes after coding and rebrand are complete.

tasks.title: Add participant session expiry schema field
tasks.desc: Added nullable participants.session_expires_at with a roadmap-scoped expiry index as the schema foundation for accountless session expiry, without changing existing session behavior.

tasks.title: Enforce expired participant sessions in backend auth
tasks.desc: Implemented centralized expired-session enforcement: valid sessions renew to now + 30 days, legacy null expiries initialize on successful auth, revoked sessions never renew, read-only routes persist renewal, and SSE streams close at session expiry.

tasks.title: Add frontend expired-session UX and auth-cache cleanup
tasks.desc: Added frontend expired-session handling that clears only scoped auth cache, preserves the local roadmap cache, marks the copy unsynced, and tells users to rejoin through an active invite link.

tasks.title: Expose owner-facing session expiry metadata
tasks.desc: Exposed participant session_expires_at in participant responses and owner-facing Team metadata without exposing raw tokens or token hashes.

tasks.title: Add app-level in-memory rate limiter service
tasks.desc: Added a single-process in-memory FastAPI rate limiter with action/key buckets, TTL cleanup, generic 429 responses, and Retry-After headers.

tasks.title: Apply rate limiting to join, password, and roadmap creation
tasks.desc: Applied rate limiting to roadmap creation, join attempts, resolved share-link joins, and wrong-password attempts while avoiding token-validity leaks.

tasks.title: Apply rate limiting to event tickets and owner share actions
tasks.desc: Applied rate limiting to event-ticket issuance and owner share-link rotate/revoke actions while keeping normal SSE reconnect and owner management behavior usable.

tasks.title: Add CSP Report-Only header in Next.js
tasks.desc: Added a Next.js Content-Security-Policy-Report-Only header with API/SSE-compatible connect-src and production-oriented baseline directives without enforcing CSP yet.

tasks.title: Add API security and cache-control headers
tasks.desc: Added API X-Content-Type-Options: nosniff and no-store handling for sensitive roadmap JSON responses while preserving SSE stream behavior.

tasks.title: Document and inspect deployed security headers
tasks.desc: Header inspection commands are documented, but deployed/staging response headers still need to be inspected before this task is fully complete.

tasks.title: Run security hardening implementation QA smoke tests
tasks.desc: The security hardening smoke checklist is documented and should be run on local/staging after the implementation/rebrand gate; do not mark complete until the checklist is actually executed.

tasks.title: Re-audit security hardening before rebrand
tasks.desc: Completed focused security hardening audit after implementation. The audit found renewal-persistence and SSE-expiry blockers; both were fixed and validation passed. This is a focused code/review audit; broad manual QA is deferred to the final QA phase.

tasks.title: Add relational projection schema migrations
tasks.desc: Added additive relational projection ORM models and Alembic migration 0007 for phases, tasks, dependencies, and task assignees while keeping snapshot_json canonical.

tasks.title: Build snapshot-to-relational projection mapper
tasks.desc: Added snapshot-to-relational projection rebuild service that maps canonical roadmap snapshots into derivative phase, task, dependency, assignee, tag, parent, and source_json rows.

tasks.title: Backfill relational projection from existing snapshots
tasks.desc: Added service-level backfill helper for active roadmaps. No public/admin route was added because the app does not yet have an admin-only operator framework.

tasks.title: Sync projection rows on create, update, import, and restore
tasks.desc: Wired best-effort projection rebuilds after canonical snapshot writes on create, full update/import-style save, and version restore, using savepoints so projection failure does not break snapshot writes.

tasks.title: Add projection parity validation and drift checks
tasks.desc: Added projection serialization and parity validation covering phase/task counts, order, IDs, scalar fields, parent links, dependencies, assignees, and tags.

tasks.title: Add optional read-path projection feature flag
tasks.desc: Added disabled-by-default ROADFORGE_ROADMAP_PROJECTION_READ_ENABLED. When enabled, the read path uses projection only if parity passes and otherwise falls back to snapshot_json.

tasks.title: Design partial write endpoint contract
tasks.desc: Documented the future partial roadmap write endpoint contract for phase/task CRUD, reorder, dependency links, assignees/tags, concurrency, activity logs, rollback, and non-goals.

tasks.title: Re-audit relational projection readiness
tasks.desc: Re-audited relational projection readiness. Blockers around canonical write safety and incomplete parity checks were identified, fixed with best-effort savepoint sync and scalar parity, and the projection slice is ready for validation/commit. This is a focused code/review audit; broad manual QA is deferred to the final QA phase.

phases.name: Delivered Realtime Scaling and Conflict UX Foundation

tasks.title: Add Redis-backed realtime state
tasks.desc: Completed the initial Redis-backed realtime state rollout: SSE event bus, event tickets, edit locks, and rate limiter storage now have Redis-backed adapters behind memory-default configuration. Multi-worker support is guarded and still requires dedicated regression validation before production rollout.

tasks.title: Design Redis adapter boundaries for realtime services
tasks.desc: Documented Redis adapter boundaries for SSE event bus, event tickets, edit locks, and rate limiting, including key patterns, failure behavior, Pub/Sub vs Streams decision, and staged multi-worker rollout.

tasks.title: Add Redis service and configuration for dev/prod
tasks.desc: Added passive Redis infrastructure/configuration for local and hosting-bay deployment, including REDIS_URL, ROADFORGE_REALTIME_BACKEND, Redis key prefix, health checks, and docs while keeping memory as the default backend.

tasks.title: Move SSE event bus to Redis pub/sub or streams
tasks.desc: Added Redis Pub/Sub event bus adapter selected by ROADFORGE_REALTIME_BACKEND=redis while preserving the existing SSE wire format, heartbeat behavior, and memory default.

tasks.title: Move event tickets to Redis TTL storage
tasks.desc: Added Redis TTL event-ticket storage with atomic one-time consume behavior, preserving 30-second ticket TTL, wrong-roadmap burn semantics, and existing event-ticket API shape.

tasks.title: Move edit locks to Redis TTL storage
tasks.desc: Added Redis TTL edit-lock storage with hashed target keys, roadmap lock indexes, Lua-based atomic acquire/refresh/release, and preserved lock.acquired/lock.released event behavior.

tasks.title: Move rate limiter storage adapter to Redis
tasks.desc: Added Redis fixed-window rate limiter storage with hashed keys, Lua-based atomic counters, unchanged 429/Retry-After behavior, and fail-open Redis outage behavior with warning logs.

tasks.title: Add realtime multi-worker regression checks
tasks.desc: Added the RF-886 multi-worker realtime regression checklist covering cross-worker events, tickets, locks, shared rate limits, revoke/delete events, SSE reconnect, and Redis outage behavior. The checklist still needs to be executed before production multi-worker rollout.

tasks.title: Enable multi-worker deployment mode
tasks.desc: Added guarded configurable multi-worker mode through ROADFORGE_API_WORKERS. Startup refuses ROADFORGE_API_WORKERS > 1 unless ROADFORGE_REALTIME_BACKEND=redis; production rollout still requires RF-886 validation.

tasks.title: Add structured merge conflict UX
tasks.desc: Initial structured conflict UX is complete: stale saves now return structured conflict metadata, the client can review local vs server state, and users can explicitly use the server version, keep their local version, or keep editing locally. Selected field/task-level merge remains deferred as a future enhancement.

tasks.title: Design structured conflict resolution UX
tasks.desc: Documented the structured conflict resolution UX scope, state model, non-goals, server metadata, client review behavior, safe fallback, QA checklist, and rollback path.

tasks.title: Add server conflict metadata for structured conflicts
tasks.desc: Added structured 409 roadmap conflict metadata with roadmap_conflict code, server updated timestamp, client base timestamp, server snapshot, and lightweight summary counts/IDs without exposing auth or invite data.

tasks.title: Add client conflict review panel
tasks.desc: Added client parsing/storage of structured conflict metadata and a conflict review panel that compares local unsynced state with the latest server snapshot at roadmap, phase, and task levels.

tasks.title: Implement conflict resolution actions
tasks.desc: Added safe whole-roadmap conflict resolution actions: use server version via existing reload confirmation, keep local version by retrying against server_updated_at, and keep editing locally. Field-level merge remains deferred.

tasks.title: Re-audit realtime and conflict architecture before rebrand
tasks.desc: Audit Redis-backed realtime, guarded multi-worker behavior, and the initial structured conflict UX before the Anvilary rebrand begins. This should verify the green validation results and decide whether deferred field-level merge work stays post-rebrand. This is a focused code/review audit; broad manual QA is deferred to the final QA phase.

phases.name: Delivered Engineering Tests, Docs, and Release Hardening Foundation

tasks.title: Add backend auth and share-link tests
tasks.desc: Add backend tests for auth/session expiry, share-link join behavior, participant revoke, rate-limited join/password attempts, and owner share-link actions.

tasks.title: Add frontend smoke tests for core flows
tasks.desc: Add frontend smoke coverage for core create/save/join/share/import/export flows after hardening and rebrand wiring are in place.

tasks.title: Add migration/schema drift validation
tasks.desc: Add migration/schema drift checks for participant session expiry fields and relational roadmap projection tables.

tasks.title: Add API contract examples and backend smoke docs
tasks.desc: Add request/response examples and lightweight contract expectations for core roadmap, share, participants, versions, activity, and auth endpoints.

tasks.title: Add backend lint/type/test tooling to CI
tasks.desc: Expand CI beyond Python compileall by adding backend linting, test execution, and any lightweight static checks appropriate for the FastAPI app.

tasks.title: Add dependency audit gate policy
tasks.desc: Define how dependency audits are run, what severity blocks release, and how exceptions are documented.

tasks.title: Add SECURITY.md and responsible disclosure notes
tasks.desc: Document how to report security issues, accountless token-model limitations, supported deployment assumptions, and personal-use/non-commercial release boundaries.

tasks.title: Add security docs index and implementation links
tasks.desc: Add a docs/security or docs/architecture index when appropriate and link the policy documents from README/backend docs without duplicating full content.

phases.name: Delivered Product-Control Foundations and Live UX Defects

tasks.title: Fix missing design tokens and warning tokens
tasks.desc: Add --ink-1, --ink-6, --bg-1, --molten-dim, --warning, --warning-bg, and --warning-border to tokens.css for dark and light themes. Fixes title edit text, drag overlay, switcher active highlight, lock pill tint, and conflict/warning surfaces found in the UX audits. This is a focused code/review audit; broad manual QA is deferred to the final QA phase.

tasks.title: Fix phase collapse default state for real roadmaps
tasks.desc: Remove hardcoded sample phase state such as p2 and default non-sample roadmaps to all phases open unless local UI state exists. This fixes a live non-sample workspace bug found in the audits.

tasks.title: Fix expanded task default state
tasks.desc: Remove the hardcoded sample expandedTaskId RF-05 and start with no task expanded unless local UI state later restores it.

tasks.title: Scope wizard field styles to the wizard only
tasks.desc: Change global .field / .field .input wizard rules so they are scoped under the wizard container and cannot collide with task edit forms or future inline editors.

tasks.title: Add z-index layer tokens for panels, modals, and wizard
tasks.desc: Introduce explicit z-index tokens for panel, modal, and wizard layers so slide panels, modal scrims, and wizard scrims stack predictably.

tasks.title: Make locked task state visually visible
tasks.desc: Add .task.locked styling and ensure lock pills use defined tokens so tasks locked by another participant are visibly different without breaking the row layout.

tasks.title: Keep drag handle column stable when tasks expand
tasks.desc: Render/reserve the drag-handle column in collapsed, expanded, editing, draft, locked, done, next, and readonly states. Expanded tasks must not slide left when the handle is disabled.

tasks.title: Define and document task row layout invariants
tasks.desc: Add a short internal UI note or code comments defining stable task row columns for collapsed, expanded, editing, draft, locked, done, next, and claimed states so future UI work does not reintroduce shifting controls.

tasks.title: Add visible locked/read-only affordances to task actions
tasks.desc: Ensure disabled checkbox, edit, drag, and claim controls communicate why they are unavailable for viewers, expired/revoked sessions, or locks.

tasks.title: Always confirm destructive replace-current imports
tasks.desc: Show an import review step even for perfectly valid JSON files. Replace-current imports must show phase/task counts and require explicit confirmation before mutating current state.

tasks.title: Improve Import/Export entry flow and split confusing modal actions
tasks.desc: Audit the toolbar import/export icon and modal tabs. Redesign the flow so Import and Export are clearly separated, with no confusing icon-to-modal mismatch. Keep JSON compatibility intact.

tasks.title: Add timestamped logical export filenames
tasks.desc: Rename JSON exports to a predictable pattern such as anvilary-roadmaps-{slug-or-name}-{YYYYMMDD-HHMMSS}.roadforge while preserving schema compatibility.

tasks.title: Disable or explain Activity for local-only roadmaps
tasks.desc: Disable Activity when there is no serverRoadmapId or show a clear local-only explanation instead of opening an empty panel.

tasks.title: Add empty states for filtered-out workspace and phases
tasks.desc: Differentiate no tasks yet from no tasks match current filters. Add workspace-level empty result state with Clear filters action.

tasks.title: Add hover and focus affordance for inline roadmap title rename
tasks.desc: Make the editable roadmap title visibly interactive through cursor, hover, focus, and keyboard affordances without adding clutter.

tasks.title: Normalize slide panel and modal surfaces
tasks.desc: Align slide-panel background, close button, border/shadow, and scrim behavior with modal surfaces so panels and modals feel like the same product system before rebrand.

tasks.title: Fix wizard context mutation before cancel
tasks.desc: Keep wizard input in local draft state until the final create action. Canceling the wizard must not persist partial roadmap name or setup choices.

tasks.title: Remove noisy autogenerated subtask description
tasks.desc: Stop creating default subtask descriptions such as Subtask of ... and review whether the automatic subtask tag should remain, become optional, or be replaced later by hierarchy metadata.

tasks.title: Add aria-labelledby and focus consistency to shared modals
tasks.desc: Ensure Modal/ConfirmDialog and main product dialogs announce titles correctly and preserve Escape/focus behavior.

tasks.title: Run product-control foundation code re-audit
tasks.desc: Ran the product-control foundation code re-audit after Phase 17 implementation and resolved follow-up accessibility/style polish before marking the phase complete.

tasks.title: Disable OpenAPI docs and ReDoc outside development
tasks.desc: Gate /api/docs and /api/redoc behind environment settings so production deployments do not expose a full reconnaissance surface.

tasks.title: Add trusted proxy client-IP extraction
tasks.desc: Add explicit trusted proxy configuration so deployed rate limiting uses the real client IP instead of collapsing all users to 127.0.0.1 behind Cloudflare or reverse proxies.

tasks.title: Require SECRET_KEY or equivalent production secret setting
tasks.desc: Add a production-safe secret configuration required for future OAuth/account sessions and refuse unsafe defaults in production.

tasks.title: Add production startup guard for unsafe default database configuration
tasks.desc: Refuse production startup when DATABASE_URL or credentials are missing/unsafe defaults, while keeping local dev and self-hosted documented paths clear.

tasks.title: Harden security headers for production
tasks.desc: Review and complete HSTS, X-Frame-Options/frame-ancestors, referrer policy, content-type options, cache-control, and CSP report/enforce staging across frontend/API/proxy.

tasks.title: Add rate limiting to checkpoint and roadmap read-sensitive paths
tasks.desc: Added rate limiting to checkpoint and roadmap read-sensitive paths, using participant/roadmap-scoped keys where appropriate while preserving realtime/SSE behavior.

tasks.title: Add change_summary action allowlist
tasks.desc: Restrict client-provided activity actions to a known allowlist so arbitrary strings cannot become activity log action names.

tasks.title: Make update conflict input non-bypassable
tasks.desc: Ensure last_updated_at conflict checks cannot be silently bypassed by clients omitting the field. Decide whether to require it for server-backed edits or enforce safe fallback behavior.

tasks.title: Add SELECT FOR UPDATE to roadmap update path
tasks.desc: Lock the roadmap row during update_roadmap conflict checks and writes so concurrent PUTs cannot both pass the stale check and silently overwrite each other.

tasks.title: Reduce authenticated GET write pressure
tasks.desc: Stop committing last_seen_at on every GET; update conditionally using a time delta or separate lightweight path to avoid avoidable write load.

tasks.title: Document public deployment security assumptions
tasks.desc: Update docs with OpenAPI docs policy, trusted proxy requirements, Redis requirement for public rate limiting, production secret requirements, and self-hosted configuration notes.

tasks.title: Run security hardening re-audit
tasks.desc: Ran the security hardening re-audit, fixed the invalid production secret placeholder, added missing write-path rate limits, and confirmed the phase had no remaining security blockers.

tasks.title: Rate limit roadmap write paths
tasks.desc: Added participant/roadmap-scoped rate limits to roadmap update, delete, version restore, lock acquire, and lock release paths after the Phase 18 security re-audit identified unguarded authenticated write loops.

tasks.title: Run backend golden-rules architecture audit
tasks.desc: Ran a backend architecture audit focused on file size, responsibility boundaries, function size, parameter count, duplication, and safe refactor slices before moving to the next feature phase.

tasks.title: Remove backend service duplication
tasks.desc: Created a focused session policy helper for shared session time behavior and extracted duplicate roadmap version trimming logic, avoiding private cross-service imports and preserving behavior.

tasks.title: Run frontend golden-rules architecture audit
tasks.desc: Ran a frontend architecture audit focused on component/hook size, prop and parameter count, save/autosync boundaries, CSS coupling, API-service boundaries, and small inconsistency cleanup opportunities.

tasks.title: Clean up frontend error and style handling
tasks.desc: Removed dead share-link render branching, moved modal inline styles into ownership CSS, added typed HTTP error helpers, and replaced raw status-string checks in save/share flows.

tasks.title: Add backend update_roadmap success tests
tasks.desc: Cover PUT name-only, phases-only, and combined updates, including owner/editor authorization and viewer denial.

tasks.title: Add stale conflict 409 contract tests
tasks.desc: Assert stale last_updated_at returns documented structured 409 metadata and preserves local/server conflict semantics.

tasks.title: Add concurrent update tests for row locking
tasks.desc: Test that concurrent PUTs cannot silently overwrite each other after SELECT FOR UPDATE/concurrency hardening.

tasks.title: Add version checkpoint and list tests
tasks.desc: Cover manual checkpoint creation, idempotent behavior where applicable, retention expectations, and version list response shape.

tasks.title: Add restore tests
tasks.desc: Cover restoring older versions, snapshot replacement, restored activity/version row, SSE event expectation, and projection sync.

tasks.title: Add projection serialization round-trip tests
tasks.desc: Test snapshot -> relational projection -> serialize_projection_to_snapshot produces equivalent phase/task data.

tasks.title: Add projection parity tests across create/update/restore
tasks.desc: Validate projection parity after create, update, import/replace, and restore flows, including failure/fallback behavior.

tasks.title: Add backfill operator command
tasks.desc: Expose a safe CLI or operator-only command for backfill_all_roadmap_projections. It must be idempotent, log counts, and not require enabling projection reads.

tasks.title: Document projection backfill runbook
tasks.desc: Document when to run backfill, expected output, parity verification commands, rollback behavior, and deployment ordering.

tasks.title: Enable projection-read flag in test-only scenarios
tasks.desc: Run a test matrix with ROADFORGE_ROADMAP_PROJECTION_READ_ENABLED enabled to prove the read fallback path and projection read path remain equivalent.

tasks.title: Add regression tests for auth/share/version rate limits
tasks.desc: Extend backend tests to cover new rate limits without making the suite flaky.

tasks.title: Run backend persistence safety audit
tasks.desc: Audit update/conflict/version/restore/projection/backfill after tests are in place and before enabling partial relational writes. This is a focused code/review audit; broad manual QA is deferred to the final QA phase.

tasks.title: Define import merge model and conflict types
tasks.desc: Add typed structures for import merge plans, matched entities, automatic changes, conflicts, deletes, additions, and dangerous replace decisions.

tasks.title: Guarantee stable generated task and phase IDs for new content
tasks.desc: Replace weak timestamp/local counters for new task IDs with collision-resistant stable IDs. Do not use display numbers as identity.

tasks.title: Fix import repair counter determinism
tasks.desc: Make repair sequence state local to a single repairImportedRoadmap call rather than module-level so repaired imports are deterministic and isolated.

tasks.title: Implement current/imported entity indexing
tasks.desc: Build indexCurrentState helpers for phases/tasks by ID, title/name fallback within phase, and structural metadata needed by merge decisions.

tasks.title: Implement ID-first entity matching with safe fallbacks
tasks.desc: Match phases and tasks by stable ID first, then controlled name/title fallback only when safe. Record confidence and ambiguous matches for review.

tasks.title: Implement task field merge rules
tasks.desc: Preserve done=true if either side completed the task, keep local active-work intent where appropriate, union tags/assignees/deps safely, recompute derived progress/status, and flag real title/description/delete conflicts.

tasks.title: Implement import preview summary for every import
tasks.desc: Always show phase/task counts, added/changed/deleted/conflict counts, sample changes, and the selected import mode before applying anything.

tasks.title: Add safe-additions-only import mode
tasks.desc: Let users import only new phases/tasks/tags without applying risky edits or deletes. This provides a low-risk collaboration path before full merge review.

tasks.title: Add explicit replace-everything danger flow
tasks.desc: Keep full replacement available only behind clear language and explicit confirmation. It must never be the silent default for clean JSON.

tasks.title: Add merge conflict review panel
tasks.desc: Build per-entity conflict review UI for title/description/delete/progress conflicts with keep local, keep import, and safe bulk actions.

tasks.title: Update export envelope with optional tag registry and metadata
tasks.desc: Prepare backward-compatible export fields for tagRegistry and future merge metadata while keeping existing RoadForge imports valid.

tasks.title: Add import/merge unit tests
tasks.desc: Cover added tasks, done preservation, title conflict, deleted modified task, ambiguous title fallback, tag/assignee union, safe-additions-only mode, and replace confirmation.

tasks.title: Plan server-supported import endpoint
tasks.desc: Design POST /api/roadmaps/{id}/import for later server-side merge against projection rows, but do not make it mandatory until frontend merge UX is proven.

tasks.title: Run import/merge data-safety audit
tasks.desc: Audit the full import flow to confirm no clean or repaired import can silently destroy existing user progress. This is a focused code/review audit; broad manual QA is deferred to the final QA phase.

tasks.title: Finalize relational projection completion criteria
tasks.desc: Define what counts as RF-821 complete: parity tests, backfill command, read-path test mode, failure fallback, operational docs, and snapshot canonical policy.

tasks.title: Complete projection backfill and parity verification workflow
tasks.desc: Wire the backfill operator path into documented local/staging commands and verify active roadmaps can be backfilled and parity-checked safely.

tasks.title: Add projection drift reporting
tasks.desc: Add a safe diagnostic command or test helper that reports projection drift without mutating data.

tasks.title: Strengthen projection read fallback behavior
tasks.desc: Ensure projection-read flag failures clearly fall back to snapshot reads, log enough context, and never break export/restore/local-first flows.

tasks.title: Decide and document snapshot_json canonical policy
tasks.desc: Document that snapshot_json remains canonical until partial writes are proven; define when, if ever, relational rows can become canonical.

tasks.title: Update architecture docs for completed RF-821 foundation
tasks.desc: Refresh relational schema/projection docs to reflect actual migrations, tests, backfill, parity, read flag, and rollback strategy.

tasks.title: Run RF-821 completion audit
tasks.desc: Audit relational projection readiness and explicitly mark legacy RF-821 complete only if backfill, parity, docs, and fallback behavior are proven. This is a focused code/review audit; broad manual QA is deferred to the final QA phase.

tasks.title: Define first partial write contract for task done toggle
tasks.desc: Convert legacy RF-877 into a concrete first slice: task done toggle only, with last_updated_at, owner/editor auth, conflict behavior, activity, projection sync, and SSE broadcast.

tasks.title: Add PatchTaskDoneRequest schema
tasks.desc: Add a narrow Pydantic DTO for task done toggle with done and last_updated_at fields, plus validation and documented errors.

tasks.title: Add PATCH task done endpoint
tasks.desc: Add PATCH /api/roadmaps/{id}/tasks/{task_id}/done or equivalent route with owner/editor access, rate limiting, and no viewer mutation access.

tasks.title: Implement transactional task done patch service
tasks.desc: Update relational task row, serialize projection back to snapshot_json, update roadmap timestamp, and commit in one transaction while preserving snapshot canonical policy.

tasks.title: Add optimistic lock and stale conflict handling to patch service
tasks.desc: Use roadmap last_updated_at checks and return structured 409 metadata compatible with existing conflict UI.

tasks.title: Add activity log and SSE broadcast for task done patch
tasks.desc: Log a task-level activity row with entity_id=client_task_id and broadcast roadmap.updated after successful commit.

tasks.title: Add backend tests for partial task done patch
tasks.desc: Cover done true, done false, viewer denied, stale conflict, unknown task, projection sync, snapshot sync, activity, and SSE expectations where practical.

tasks.title: Add frontend patchTaskDone service
tasks.desc: Add a focused frontend service function for the partial done toggle endpoint without changing other task mutations.

tasks.title: Implement optimistic done toggle with revert
tasks.desc: Update UI immediately, fire PATCH, update updatedAt on success, revert and toast on error, and route 409 through existing conflict handling.

tasks.title: Suppress full autosync race while PATCH is in flight
tasks.desc: Prevent concurrent debounced full PUT from racing a partial PATCH for the same task or immediate roadmap state.

tasks.title: Add per-task partial-write in-flight guard
tasks.desc: Avoid duplicate PATCH calls on the same task and show small pending/error affordance if needed.

tasks.title: Run RF-877 first partial write audit
tasks.desc: Audit backend/frontend diff, conflict behavior, autosync interaction, projection sync, and fallback to full save before marking legacy RF-877 complete. This is a focused code/review audit; broad manual QA is deferred to the final QA phase.

phases.name: Inline Task Editing and Draft Creation

tasks.title: Define unified task row state model
tasks.desc: Define row states for collapsed, expanded, editing, draft, locked, done, next, claimed, readonly, and pending partial write, with stable columns and focus expectations.

tasks.title: Add DraftTaskRow component
tasks.desc: Create a dedicated DraftTaskRow with reserved handle column, disabled/placeholder checkbox, autofocus title input, Add and Discard actions, and inline validation.

tasks.title: Move task creation to phase-local draft state
tasks.desc: Do not mutate phases/context until the draft is confirmed. Drafts should not autosync or persist before confirmation.

tasks.title: Confirm draft creates a real task and enters edit mode
tasks.desc: On Add/Enter, create the real task with a stable ID, expand it, and enter inline edit mode so the user can continue filling details.

tasks.title: Add draft discard and collapse behavior
tasks.desc: Escape, Cancel, click outside if safe, or phase collapse should discard uncommitted draft without mutating roadmap data.

tasks.title: Add Enter/Escape keyboard support to task edit form
tasks.desc: Enter saves appropriate single-line fields, Escape cancels, and focus behavior remains predictable for multiline descriptions.

tasks.title: Keep edit mode inline and modal-free for normal task edits
tasks.desc: Ensure normal title/description/estimate/tags/assignee edits happen in place and do not open a modal. Heavy workflows may still use panels/modals.

tasks.title: Add unsaved edit guard for collapse/navigation
tasks.desc: If a task has unsaved inline edits and the user collapses the containing phase or navigates away, provide a clear save/discard path.

tasks.title: Replace comma tag editing with chip-ready input foundation
tasks.desc: Prepare task edit tag input for canonical tag suggestions and future tag registry while maintaining current string-tag compatibility.

tasks.title: Run inline task workflow UX audit
tasks.desc: Reviewed the inline draft/edit workflow after implementation: draft rows create only on confirm, typed drafts/dirty edits are guarded against accidental collapse/navigation, Enter/Escape behavior is defined, chip-ready tags are in place, and broad manual QA remains deferred to the final QA phase.

phases.name: Workspace Responsive Shell and Interaction Polish

tasks.title: Audit workspace fullscreen, half-screen, tablet, and mobile layouts
tasks.desc: Treat half-screen desktop as the primary working viewport, then audit fullscreen, tablet, and mobile for width, density, wrapping, vertical rhythm, and dead gutters.

tasks.title: Widen workspace content rails with responsive layout tokens
tasks.desc: Introduce or tune workspace width tokens so fullscreen uses available space better while half-screen remains readable and centered.

tasks.title: Optimize workspace header and toolbar wrapping for half-screen use
tasks.desc: Make header actions, save/share/status controls, search, filters, Activity, and Versions wrap predictably without cramped or misleading ordering.

tasks.title: Polish phase and task row density across breakpoints
tasks.desc: Adjust spacing, typography, row width, and nested detail rhythm so phase/task rows stay useful at half-screen and do not feel undersized on fullscreen.

tasks.title: Run nested click-propagation and popover bug sweep
tasks.desc: Audit clickable phase headers, color pickers, task toggles, dropdowns, popovers, panels, and inline forms for rapid open/close or accidental collapse behavior.

tasks.title: Fix workspace interaction bugs found during sweep
tasks.desc: Patch only confirmed interaction bugs from the sweep as focused changes. Do not bundle broad redesign work into this task.

tasks.title: Create responsive workspace manual QA matrix
tasks.desc: Document exact browser widths and checks for fullscreen, half-screen, tablet, mobile, dark/light mode, local/synced roadmaps, and read-only views.

tasks.title: Run workspace responsive and interaction audit
tasks.desc: Run a final focused audit for this phase and decide whether the workspace shell is ready for landing-page and final QA work.

phases.name: Expanded Task Detail and Inline Editing Redesign

tasks.title: Audit expanded task detail hierarchy and action layout
tasks.desc: Review the expanded task surface from the half-screen screenshots and code: metadata hierarchy, dependency card, subtask area, action placement, clipped popovers, edit affordances, and read-only/locked states before redesigning the detail workflow.

tasks.title: Rename visible Next affordance to Recommended
tasks.desc: Keep the internal next flag for schema compatibility, but change user-facing copy and styling from NEXT to Recommended/Recommended next with green success styling so the app suggests work without sounding prescriptive.

tasks.title: Add inline double-click editing for task title, description, and estimate
tasks.desc: Allow task title, description, and estimate to enter focused inline edit mode by double-clicking or using a subtle edit affordance. Enter saves single-line fields, Escape cancels, textarea keeps normal multiline behavior, and dirty changes are protected by the same guard/confirmation policy.

tasks.title: Add inline phase name editing
tasks.desc: Let users rename a phase inline from the phase header/settings flow without opening a modal. Enter applies, Escape cancels, blank names are rejected, and unsaved edits are protected consistently.

tasks.title: Replace Discard wording with Cancel and add dirty-cancel confirmation
tasks.desc: Rename Discard actions to Cancel. If the edit form is clean, Cancel/Escape closes immediately. If changes are dirty, show an app-styled confirmation before losing edits. Avoid native browser confirm dialogs.

tasks.title: Replace phase color button with phase settings menu
tasks.desc: Replace the color-only phase icon with an elegant phase settings menu that can host rename, color, delete, and future phase actions. Preserve lock/read-only behavior and prevent click propagation from toggling the phase.

tasks.title: Add phase delete flow with task-loss confirmation
tasks.desc: Add an owner/editor phase delete action from the settings menu with a clear confirmation showing that all tasks and subtasks in that phase will be removed. Keep the flow app-styled, version/restore-aware, and blocked for read-only users.

tasks.title: Convert Add subtask and Link dependency to full-width inline panels
tasks.desc: Replace narrow/floating task action popovers with full-width inline panels inside the expanded task detail area. Add subtask and Link dependency should align with the dependency card width, avoid clipping, and behave well in half-screen layouts.

tasks.title: Simplify subtask row model and UI
tasks.desc: Redesign subtasks as simpler children of the main task: drag handle, checkbox, editable title, compact generated ID, and right-side delete action. Do not expose full task metadata, description, assignees, tags, or dependencies for subtasks yet.

tasks.title: Add editable subtask title
tasks.desc: Allow subtask names to be edited in place by clicking/double-clicking the title. Enter saves, Escape cancels, blank titles are rejected, and edits do not open the full parent task edit form.

tasks.title: Add subtask delete action
tasks.desc: Add a subtle right-side delete icon for subtasks with safe app-styled confirmation or low-friction guarded deletion. Preserve dependency/completion guard behavior and avoid accidental deletes.

tasks.title: Add subtask drag-and-drop ordering within parent task
tasks.desc: Support drag-and-drop ordering of subtasks within the same parent task only. Do not allow moving subtasks across parent tasks yet. Preserve stable IDs and persisted order.

tasks.title: Add parent-based subtask ID generation
tasks.desc: Generate display-friendly subtask IDs based on the parent task ID, such as WR-2501-01, WR-2501-02, while keeping collision-safe behavior for imported or legacy subtasks. Do not break stable task IDs internally.

tasks.title: Run expanded task workflow UX audit
tasks.desc: Run a focused audit of the expanded task detail workflow, inline editing, phase settings menu, full-width action panels, simplified subtasks, subtask editing/deletion/reordering, keyboard behavior, and half-screen responsiveness before moving on.

phases.name: Workspace UI State, Expansion, and Task Numbering

tasks.title: Fix self-lock and transient popover regressions from expanded task redesign
tasks.desc: Fix the Phase 26 interaction regressions observed after expanded task/detail work: own locks must not render as locked-by-other messages such as “Alexandre is editing this task”; Add subtask and Link dependency must not disable actions for the current editor; phase settings color picker must stay open long enough to select a color; and click propagation around phase settings, color popovers, and task action panels must be audited before continuing the UI-state phase.

tasks.title: Design local roadmap UI state schema
tasks.desc: Define rf:ui:{roadmapId} with openPhaseIds, expandedTaskIds, and future-safe slots for filters or panel preferences without syncing this state to collaborators.

tasks.title: Add UI state storage helpers
tasks.desc: Add lib/ui-state.ts with parse-safe load/save/clear helpers and tests for missing, malformed, and legacy values.

tasks.title: Persist open phase IDs locally
tasks.desc: Persist phase collapse/expand choices per roadmap and restore them on reload. First load defaults to all phases open.

tasks.title: Persist expanded task IDs locally
tasks.desc: Allow multiple expanded tasks and persist their IDs per roadmap. Reopening a phase restores tasks that were expanded before collapse.

tasks.title: Keep filtering/search from mutating saved UI state
tasks.desc: When filters/search force matching phases open, do not overwrite the user’s stored openPhaseIds or expandedTaskIds.

tasks.title: Add expand all and collapse all behaviors
tasks.desc: Add clear, predictable controls for opening/closing phases and optionally expanded tasks without breaking local UI state.

tasks.title: Add task display numbering helper
tasks.desc: Add display-only helper for human task references: phase 10 renders 10.01 or display code 1001, while stable task.id remains canonical for deps/merge/activity.

tasks.title: Render task display numbers without replacing stable IDs internally
tasks.desc: Show user-friendly display numbers in rows, conflict/import summaries, and activity where useful, while preserving raw task.id as data identity.

tasks.title: Add UI state and numbering tests
tasks.desc: Cover UI state storage, malformed values, phase/task expansion restore, and task display number generation.

tasks.title: Run workspace state UX audit
tasks.desc: Audit collapse/expand, multiple expanded tasks, filtering interactions, and task display numbering for intuitive behavior. This is a focused code/review audit; broad manual QA is deferred to the final QA phase.

tasks.title: Audit current landing page narrative and visual hierarchy
tasks.desc: Review the current hero, how-it-works, features, footer, product preview, and CTA flow. Identify generic copy, weak proof, fake social proof, and fullscreen/half-screen layout problems.

tasks.title: Define landing page product story and section order
tasks.desc: Define the guided story: problem, local-first workspace, structured phases/tasks, optional collaboration, AI-readable JSON, self-hosting, and final CTA.

tasks.title: Build reusable LandingSectionFrame container
tasks.desc: Create a shared section wrapper with consistent content rails, viewport-aware height, responsive padding, and variants for centered, split, media-heavy, and CTA sections.

tasks.title: Redesign hero with stronger product positioning and truthful proof
tasks.desc: Sharpen the hero around RoadForge/Anvilary Roadmaps as a local-first roadmap tool with optional sync. Remove or replace any placeholder GitHub star/social-proof counts unless real.

tasks.title: Build product problem and workflow sections
tasks.desc: Show why ordinary docs/boards/agent prompts drift, then demonstrate how RoadForge organizes planning into phases, tasks, dependencies, next work, and collapsible focus.

tasks.title: Create stronger workspace demo/proof section
tasks.desc: Use realistic RoadForge UI slices or generated product scenes to show what the app does instead of relying mostly on generic feature cards.

tasks.title: Rebuild feature sections around differentiated strengths
tasks.desc: Replace generic feature-grid messaging with concrete benefits: local-first start, optional collaboration, safe JSON import/export, AI/coding-agent readability, self-hosting, and no lock-in.

tasks.title: Refine final CTA, footer, and trust/supporting links
tasks.desc: Make the end of the page feel intentional, with clear Create Roadmap, GitHub, docs/self-host links, version/license information, and no unsupported claims.

tasks.title: Optimize landing layout for fullscreen, half-screen, tablet, and mobile
tasks.desc: Tune layout, type scale, media sizes, card density, and vertical rhythm for the viewports that matter most, especially half-screen desktop.

tasks.title: Run landing page UX and copy audit
tasks.desc: Run a focused audit for positioning, visual depth, responsiveness, truthful claims, CTA clarity, and overall elegance before adding controlled section scrolling.

tasks.title: Design persistent Working on this task claiming model
tasks.desc: Design the claim model around an explicit Working on this control. Clarify how claim state relates to temporary edit locks, who can claim/unclaim, how stale claims expire, and how collaborators see active work without overcomplicating the locking system.

tasks.title: Add task claim fields to frontend roadmap model
tasks.desc: Add optional claim/working fields to task types, validation, upgrade, import/export repair, and local storage without breaking old roadmaps.

tasks.title: Add task claim fields to backend schemas and projection
tasks.desc: Persist claim fields through snapshot_json and relational projection rows while keeping older roadmaps compatible.

tasks.title: Add claim/unclaim partial write endpoints
tasks.desc: Add owner/editor endpoints to claim, unclaim, and owner-override a task, with conflict checks, activity log, and SSE broadcast.

tasks.title: Add frontend Working on this controls
tasks.desc: Add the user-facing Working on this / stop working control, visible claimed-by state, and collaboration cues in task rows/detail surfaces. This should become the main product-level signal for active task ownership instead of hidden edit-lock mechanics.

tasks.title: Add claim-aware edit-lock guardrails
tasks.desc: Align temporary edit locks with persistent Working on this state so self-locks never appear as locked-by-other, concurrent editing remains safe, and the lock/sync system stays simple, predictable, and smooth.

tasks.title: Preserve claim state in import/merge
tasks.desc: Define and implement merge rules for claim fields so imports do not silently remove a team member’s working-on-this state.

tasks.title: Add claim filters and Team panel visibility foundation
tasks.desc: Expose claimed by me, unclaimed, and claimed by others in data helpers so later filters/team UI can use claim state.

tasks.title: Add tests for task claiming
tasks.desc: Cover claim/unclaim/override, viewer denial, conflict behavior, activity, import preservation, and projection parity.

tasks.title: Run task claiming collaboration audit
tasks.desc: Audit task claiming against locks, assignees, partial writes, import/merge, and future account identity before proceeding to tags. This is a focused code/review audit; broad manual QA is deferred to the final QA phase.

tasks.title: Define canonical tag registry model
tasks.desc: Define TagDef with stable id, name, color, position, normalization rules, duplicate handling, delete behavior, and import/export compatibility.

tasks.title: Add optional tagRegistry to frontend roadmap model
tasks.desc: Add tagRegistry as additive optional data in types, storage, validation, upgrade, and export envelope while keeping existing string tags valid.

tasks.title: Lazy-populate registry from existing string tags
tasks.desc: On load or tag-management entry, create default registry entries for existing task.tags that do not yet exist in the registry.

tasks.title: Add tag registry backend migration and projection support
tasks.desc: Add roadmap_tags table or documented snapshot-first registry storage, depending on the final canonical policy. Keep existing tasks compatible.

tasks.title: Add tag CRUD API endpoints
tasks.desc: Add owner/editor endpoints to list/create/rename/recolor/delete tags with duplicate normalization and clear delete behavior for tasks using the tag.

tasks.title: Build tag management UI
tasks.desc: Add a Tags panel/tab for creating, renaming, recoloring, reordering, deleting, and reviewing tag usage.

tasks.title: Wire tag colors into task pills
tasks.desc: Use registry colors through safe CSS variables for task tag pills in rows, details, filters, import preview, and conflict review.

tasks.title: Improve task tag input with registry suggestions
tasks.desc: Replace fragile comma-only editing with chip/suggestion input backed by the registry, while allowing controlled creation of new tags.

tasks.title: Add tag import/merge conflict rules
tasks.desc: Merge tags by stable id/name, handle same-name different-color conflicts, preserve unknown tags, and surface registry conflicts in import preview.

tasks.title: Add tag tests
tasks.desc: Cover registry validation, import/export compatibility, duplicate normalization, task tag assignment, tag delete/rename behavior, and color rendering helpers.

tasks.title: Run tag system audit
tasks.desc: Audit tag registry, UI, import/export, filters readiness, and backend sync before building the filtering overhaul. This is a focused code/review audit; broad manual QA is deferred to the final QA phase.

tasks.title: Define unified FilterState
tasks.desc: Replace disconnected search/filter primitives with a single FilterState covering search, status, assignees/users, tags, phases, claim state, and later saved views.

tasks.title: Implement filterTasks pure helper
tasks.desc: Implement AND across categories and OR within a category. Search should match meaningful human fields, not raw internal IDs.

tasks.title: Add filter helper unit tests
tasks.desc: Test status, assignee, tag, phase, claim, text search, AND/OR semantics, empty filters, and combined filters.

tasks.title: Build compact filter bar/panel
tasks.desc: Replace the single dropdown with an intuitive filter UI: search input, status pills, assignee/user pills, tag pills, phase filter, claim filter, active filter count, and clear all.

tasks.title: Add active filter chips and clear-one behavior
tasks.desc: Show currently active filters as chips that can be removed individually, plus clear all.

tasks.title: Add search debounce and performance guardrails
tasks.desc: Add a small debounce and avoid unnecessary recomputation for large roadmaps without making filtering feel sluggish.

tasks.title: Add filtered empty states
tasks.desc: Complete workspace and phase filtered-empty states with clear copy and clear filters action.

tasks.title: Decide local/session persistence for filters
tasks.desc: Keep filters local/session-only for now, but design storage shape so account-mode saved views can be added later without rewrite.

tasks.title: Prepare filter final-QA matrix
tasks.desc: Document filter scenarios for the final manual QA pass. Do not execute broad manual filter testing during implementation unless a blocker requires it.

tasks.title: Run filtering UX audit
tasks.desc: Audit filtering power, clarity, empty states, performance, and interaction with expanded/collapsed phases before identity/rebrand work. This is a focused code/review audit; broad manual QA is deferred to the final QA phase.

tasks.title: Run full RoadForge product-flow review and define pre-QA polish backlog
tasks.desc: Review RoadForge end-to-end after workspace editing, responsive layout, landing page, controlled scroll, task claiming, tag registry, and filtering systems are complete. Walk through the app as a new visitor, local-only user, synced owner, editor, and viewer. Identify remaining UX friction, missing small features, confusing copy, visual inconsistencies, workflow gaps, and interaction bugs. Classify each item as fix before QA, defer after beta, move to Anvilary platform, or discard.

phases.name: Final Product Flow and Pre-QA Polish

tasks.title: Triage final pre-QA polish backlog from product-flow review
tasks.desc: Turn the product-flow review output into a small, prioritized pre-QA backlog. Sort every issue or feature request into fix before QA, defer after beta, move to Anvilary platform, or discard. This is the point where broad feature discovery pauses before final QA.

tasks.title: Overhaul toast positioning, stacking, and motion
tasks.desc: Move all notifications to the top-right below the header, aligned with the right page padding. Add smooth stacked enter/exit/shift animations for multiple close-together notifications and normalize success, error, info, and realtime-update feedback styles.

tasks.title: Normalize import and export notification timing
tasks.desc: Ensure import/export actions show immediate feedback before opening the file picker or save flow, while respecting browser user-activation constraints. The user should see clear feedback without delaying or blocking the native file dialog.

tasks.title: Define status-aware phase color modes
tasks.desc: Design the phase color system around Auto and Manual modes. Manual should allow presets and a validated custom hex value. Auto should derive intuitive colors from phase/task state, such as green for Complete, an active color for In Progress or someone working on a task, neutral for future/not-started, and grey/desaturated when every task is blocked.

tasks.title: Implement phase color menu foundation for auto and manual modes
tasks.desc: Extend the phase settings menu so users can choose Auto or Manual color behavior. Manual mode should keep presets and support custom hex input with validation and preview. Auto mode should show the derived status color and explain why that color was chosen.

tasks.title: Define realtime feedback contract for roadmap updates
tasks.desc: Define how users are notified when another collaborator changes the roadmap. Cover drag/drop, task edits, phase edits, task done toggles, claim/working-on-this changes, and conflict-safe handling when local unsaved edits exist.

tasks.title: Plan RoadForge MCP and assistant integration backlog
tasks.desc: Plan a future MCP/assistant integration so tools such as Claude or ChatGPT can read selected roadmaps, inspect current/recommended tasks, create or update tasks, and generate coding prompts from roadmap context without exposing secrets.

tasks.title: Run final pre-QA polish acceptance review
tasks.desc: Audit the final polish work before entering QA. Confirm the workspace, landing page, notifications, phase color behavior, collaboration feedback, and assistant-integration backlog are either ready, explicitly deferred, or moved to the Anvilary platform roadmap.

phases.name: Full Anvilary Roadmaps Rebrand and UI Foundation

tasks.title: Inventory all RoadForge and ForgeApps brand surfaces
tasks.desc: Run a full scan of UI copy, metadata, docs, manifest, favicons, export templates, filenames, README, and public pages. Classify user-facing vs compatibility-only references. This is a focused code/review audit; broad manual QA is deferred to the final QA phase.

tasks.title: Import and organize Anvilary brand assets from tmp
tasks.desc: Move selected logo/favicon/OG assets from tmp into public/brand or the chosen asset structure. Do not expose unused source files accidentally.

tasks.title: Rebrand visible product copy to Anvilary Roadmaps
tasks.desc: Replace user-facing RoadForge copy with Anvilary Roadmaps while preserving compatibility notes for .roadforge files and old exports.

tasks.title: Update app metadata, manifest, icons, and browser titles
tasks.desc: Update title templates, descriptions, app icons, theme color, manifest, favicon set, and browser titles for Anvilary Roadmaps.

tasks.title: Refine Anvilary visual token palette
tasks.desc: Update design tokens and color usage to the Anvilary visual identity while keeping contrast, dark/light themes, and operator-grade minimalism.

tasks.title: Apply Anvilary polish to the redesigned landing page and app shell
tasks.desc: Apply final Anvilary Roadmaps visual polish to the already-redesigned landing page and app shell instead of rebuilding the landing page from scratch.

tasks.title: Rebrand Import/Export compatibility language
tasks.desc: Explain .roadforge compatibility clearly: older RoadForge exports remain importable; new exports use Anvilary Roadmaps naming and timestamped filenames.

tasks.title: Rebrand documentation with compatibility notes
tasks.desc: Update README/docs to use Anvilary Roadmaps where public-facing, while preserving technical historical references where useful.

tasks.title: Run static brand-string leak scan
tasks.desc: Scan for stale RoadForge/ForgeApps references and categorize intentional compatibility references vs leaks. This is a focused code/review audit; broad manual QA is deferred to the final QA phase.

tasks.title: Prepare visual rebrand QA checklist
tasks.desc: Document dark/light theme and brand-surface checks for the final manual QA pass. Keep implementation-phase checks to code review, static scans, and automated validation.

tasks.title: Run rebrand implementation audit
tasks.desc: Audit the complete rebrand for stale copy, broken assets, SEO mismatch, theme regressions, and source-available positioning before SEO phase. This is a focused code/review audit; broad manual QA is deferred to the final QA phase.

phases.name: Claude Design Handoff and Anvilary Ecosystem Alignment

tasks.title: Define Claude Design handoff scope and acceptance criteria
tasks.desc: Decide what Claude Design should create for the main Anvilary app: portal, app launcher, auth shell, admin dashboard direction, and cross-app visual system.

tasks.title: Collect RoadForge screenshots and product states for handoff
tasks.desc: Capture clean screenshots of the workspace, landing page, modals, panels, inline task editing, import/export, share flow, and responsive states.

tasks.title: Package safe frontend design context files
tasks.desc: Prepare a safe file pack with design tokens, layout shells, components, CSS ownership files, and representative pages without secrets or irrelevant backend code.

tasks.title: Document RoadForge visual language and component principles
tasks.desc: Summarize the operator-grade but approachable style: dark/light behavior, orange accent, card depth, section rhythm, buttons, modals, panels, table/list density, and responsive priorities.

tasks.title: Write Anvilary main-app product brief
tasks.desc: Write the brief for anvilary.tools as the portal for source-available tools, shared login, app launcher, admin-only telemetry, and future cross-app consistency.

tasks.title: Create Claude Design prompt and asset manifest
tasks.desc: Create a precise token-efficient Claude Design prompt that references the handoff files, screenshots, style goals, and acceptance criteria.

tasks.title: Review Claude Design output against RoadForge system
tasks.desc: Compare Claude Design output against the RoadForge visual language and reject generic/overproduced designs that do not fit the ecosystem.

phases.name: Anvilary Platform and Admin Telemetry Planning

tasks.title: Define Anvilary main-app responsibilities
tasks.desc: Clarify that anvilary.tools owns shared login, app launcher, account/workspace shell, cross-app navigation, and admin-only dashboards. RoadForge should not become the central admin app.

tasks.title: Define cross-app identity and app-membership model
tasks.desc: Plan how one Anvilary account/session can access RoadForge, CVForge, and future apps while preserving RoadForge's local-first and self-hosted modes.

tasks.title: Define operational telemetry data-minimization policy
tasks.desc: Define what will be measured and what will not: collect operational cost/performance signals, avoid invasive click/mouse/content tracking, and keep privacy boundaries explicit.

tasks.title: Define RoadForge metrics emission contract
tasks.desc: Specify metrics RoadForge may emit later: active roadmaps, storage per roadmap/user, snapshot size, projection row counts, route/request counts, SSE duration, collaborators, rate-limit hits, errors, and latency.

tasks.title: Plan admin dashboard information architecture
tasks.desc: Design the Anvilary admin dashboard around app health, usage, storage growth, heavy roadmaps/users, active sessions, errors, and per-app operational cost signals.

tasks.title: Define retention, export, and deletion rules for telemetry
tasks.desc: Decide retention windows, deletion behavior, export needs, and what data is never stored so the analytics layer remains operational rather than invasive.

tasks.title: Decide Anvilary platform implementation sequence
tasks.desc: Decide which parts of Anvilary platform are built before RoadForge launch, which are staged after, and how RoadForge integrates without blocking local-first release quality.

tasks.title: Define per-user and per-roadmap cost accounting model
tasks.desc: Define the minimum metrics needed to understand operational cost per user/app without collecting unnecessary personal data. Cover storage used, roadmap count, collaborator count, request volume, realtime/SSE usage, background job cost, database growth, and server resource pressure.

tasks.title: Design owner-only admin cost and usage dashboard
tasks.desc: Design an admin-only dashboard in the Anvilary main app to track app usage, active users, frequency, storage, compute indicators, realtime load, and estimated cost per app/user. This dashboard is for the operator only, not public analytics.

tasks.title: Define free-first subscription trigger policy
tasks.desc: Document the free-first policy: no paid tier at launch, introduce a symbolic subscription only if user influx and hosting costs justify it, for example when monthly infrastructure cost clearly exceeds the acceptable baseline.

tasks.title: Define source boundaries for closed Anvilary platform and source-available apps
tasks.desc: Decide what stays source-closed in the main Anvilary platform and what is released as source-available/local-only app code. Clarify that hosted cloud collaboration can remain part of the official Anvilary service while local-only self-hosting remains available.

phases.name: RoadForge Integration with Anvilary Identity and Workspaces

tasks.title: Write RoadForge integration spec for Anvilary identity and workspace model
tasks.desc: Define how RoadForge integrates with the central Anvilary main-app identity/workspace model while preserving local-first, self-hosted, and accountless share-link behavior.

tasks.title: Add account-ready nullable fields migration
tasks.desc: Add owner_account_id and workspace_id to roadmaps and account_id to participants as nullable fields with no behavior change, if confirmed by the architecture spec.

tasks.title: Design account claim flow
tasks.desc: Design how an anonymous owner session claims a roadmap into an account without breaking existing invite/session behavior.

tasks.title: Design RoadForge account-aware UI shell integration
tasks.desc: Design the RoadForge-side login/account entry points that connect to Anvilary's shared identity shell without turning RoadForge into the central login/admin app.

tasks.title: Add account/session backend foundation
tasks.desc: Add account models, OAuth provider fields, internal account session token strategy, and require_account helper in an isolated module without making accounts required.

tasks.title: Add Google OAuth login
tasks.desc: Implement secure Google OAuth/OIDC with state/nonce, provider sub mapping, internal account token/session creation, and no sensitive tokens in URLs.

tasks.title: Add GitHub OAuth login
tasks.desc: Add GitHub OAuth as a second provider using the same account/session abstraction.

tasks.title: Add login/register pages using portable Anvilary UI
tasks.desc: Build Roadmaps-hosted login/register pages that use the future Anvilary shell style and can later be moved to anvilary.tools with minimal changes.

tasks.title: Add anonymous roadmap claim endpoint and UI
tasks.desc: Allow a logged-in account to claim an anonymous owner-owned roadmap using the existing owner participant session as proof.

tasks.title: Add RoadForge account/workspace dashboard entry points
tasks.desc: Add the RoadForge-facing account/workspace entry points. The global admin dashboard remains part of the main Anvilary app, not RoadForge.

tasks.title: Add workspace/team model foundation
tasks.desc: Add personal/team workspace data model and membership design, with minimal implementation needed for future multi-roadmap management.

tasks.title: Make invite flow account-aware but not account-required
tasks.desc: Cloud invite links can guide users to login/signup when appropriate, while anonymous invite links and self-hosted/no-account flows remain valid.

tasks.title: Document self-hosted auth modes
tasks.desc: Document no-auth/local-only, self-hosted OAuth, and future hosted Anvilary account modes clearly.

tasks.title: Run identity architecture and security audit
tasks.desc: Audit OAuth, account sessions, anonymous claim, invite flows, self-hosted behavior, and cross-app portability before public sharing work. This is a focused code/review audit; broad manual QA is deferred to the final QA phase.

tasks.title: Design public/community sharing model
tasks.desc: Define public viewer roadmap behavior for teams/communities, including when no login is needed, when login is encouraged, and how public links differ from editor invites.

tasks.title: Add roadmap slug data model
tasks.desc: Add nullable slug with unique constraints. Start globally unique unless workspace-scoped slugs are implemented in the same phase.

tasks.title: Add strict slug validation and reserved paths
tasks.desc: Allow lowercase ASCII letters, digits, hyphens, safe length, no consecutive hyphens, no reserved paths, no traversal/injection/unicode ambiguity.

tasks.title: Add by-slug resolver route
tasks.desc: Add /api/roadmaps/by-slug/{slug} or /r/{slug} resolver without bypassing existing auth/public-token rules. Register before catch-all roadmap_id paths.

tasks.title: Add custom URL editor in share/settings UI
tasks.desc: Allow owners to set/change/remove a custom slug with validation feedback, uniqueness handling, and clear public/private language.

tasks.title: Add public viewer page polish
tasks.desc: Polish public viewer experience for community roadmaps: read-only clarity, shareable metadata, duplicate/fork later placeholder, and no editor affordance.

tasks.title: Add slug and public sharing tests
tasks.desc: Cover validation, uniqueness, reserved words, auth behavior, public/private access, route ordering, and UI feedback.

tasks.title: Run public sharing security audit
tasks.desc: Audit slug enumeration, access control, public token behavior, custom URL safety, and community sharing UX. This is a focused code/review audit; broad manual QA is deferred to the final QA phase.

tasks.title: Define SEO and AI discoverability strategy
tasks.desc: Define target queries, product positioning, source-available language, local-first/no-account messaging, canonical domains, and AI/search crawler goals.

tasks.title: Update metadata and canonical URLs
tasks.desc: Implement high-quality title, description, canonical, robots, and localized/stable metadata as appropriate for the hosted app.

tasks.title: Add Open Graph and social preview assets
tasks.desc: Add OG/Twitter metadata and generated or curated preview images for Anvilary Roadmaps and public viewer pages.

tasks.title: Add structured data where truthful
tasks.desc: Add JSON-LD/software application/project structured data only where accurate. Do not fabricate ratings, users, awards, or claims.

tasks.title: Add sitemap and robots strategy
tasks.desc: Generate appropriate sitemap/robots behavior for app pages, public roadmap pages, docs, and protected/private pages.

tasks.title: Optimize public landing copy for search and AI summaries
tasks.desc: Optimize public landing copy for search engines and AI summaries after the product-story redesign is complete, keeping claims truthful and concrete.

tasks.title: Add docs and README search surface polish
tasks.desc: Make README and public docs informative for GitHub, recruiters, search engines, and AI tools without overclaiming features not yet shipped.

tasks.title: Audit performance and Core Web Vitals basics
tasks.desc: Check bundle size, fonts, metadata, images, static rendering, mobile viewport, and obvious SEO/performance blockers.

tasks.title: Run SEO and AI discoverability audit
tasks.desc: Audit metadata, structured data, sitemap/robots, public copy, README/docs, social previews, and search/AI detectability before deployment. This is a focused code/review audit; broad manual QA is deferred to the final QA phase.

tasks.title: Choose and add source-available non-commercial license
tasks.desc: Replace MIT/open-source positioning with a source-available, non-commercial license direction. Allow personal, educational, evaluation, and non-commercial self-hosting while reserving commercial use, paid hosting, SaaS resale, white-labeling, and monetized redistribution for Alexandre or explicit commercial license permission.

tasks.title: Finalize CONTRIBUTING and AI-agent workflow docs
tasks.desc: Write contributor setup, quality gates, branch/commit expectations, AI-agent workflow notes, and safety rules for outside contributors.

tasks.title: Run source-release hygiene review
tasks.desc: Review the public/source-available repository for secrets, generated artifacts, private notes, license conflicts, and commercial-use positioning before release.

tasks.title: Add GitHub issue templates and release checklist
tasks.desc: Add bug report, feature request, security guidance links, and release checklist templates.

tasks.title: Write self-hosting guide
tasks.desc: Document local/self-hosted install, environment variables, auth disabled/enabled modes, Redis recommendations, migrations, backups, and update flow.

tasks.title: Add public architecture overview
tasks.desc: Write a concise architecture doc explaining local-first model, optional accounts, link sharing, projection/snapshot strategy, import safety, and deployment shape.

tasks.title: Prepare public demo dataset and screenshots
tasks.desc: Prepare public demo data, screenshots, and demo media using the redesigned landing page and polished workspace states.

tasks.title: Run public repository readiness audit
tasks.desc: Audit README, license, docs, env examples, CI badges, issue templates, security docs, screenshots, and generated files before making the repo public/source-available. This is a focused code/review audit; broad manual QA is deferred to the final QA phase.

phases.name: Deferred Code Quality Refactors Before Final QA

tasks.title: Reduce useSaveFlow parameter surface
tasks.desc: Refactor useSaveFlow so it no longer receives a large parameter object of unrelated setters and flags; prefer reading RoadmapContext or grouping dependencies into clear bundles while preserving save/conflict behavior.

tasks.title: Extract loadRoadmapIntoState helper paths
tasks.desc: Split the large loadRoadmapIntoState flow into named helpers for server-load success, fallback/local load, and error/session-clearing behavior without changing hydration semantics.

tasks.title: Deduplicate participant revoke flows
tasks.desc: Evaluate and extract a small shared revoke-participant hook or helper so Workspace and ShareModal do not keep parallel revoke/error-handling logic.

tasks.title: Group PhaseList, Phase, and TaskRow callback props
tasks.desc: Reduce high prop counts in PhaseList, Phase, and TaskRow by grouping task callbacks and related state into explicit objects while preserving drag, lock, edit, and read-only behavior.

tasks.title: Decide and align autosync auth-loss behavior
tasks.desc: Decide whether autosync 401/403 should call the same session-expired handling as manual save or remain a softer offline state, then implement the chosen behavior consistently.

tasks.title: Replace raw pending-activity state setter with named action
tasks.desc: Stop exposing the raw setPendingActivityChanges setter from save-flow wiring and replace it with a named action so intent is clearer and future call sites stay constrained.

tasks.title: Isolate future roadmap CRUD stubs
tasks.desc: Move no-op or not-yet-implemented roadmap CRUD service exports into a clearly marked future/internal file, or annotate them as internal, so the active API surface remains honest.

tasks.title: Plan backend roadmap service domain split
tasks.desc: Before roadmap_service.py grows further, plan a staged extraction of version, share-link, participant, and join responsibilities into focused service modules without changing API behavior.

tasks.title: Consolidate projection snapshot counting when projection becomes primary
tasks.desc: When relational projection moves from feature-flagged support to primary read/write behavior, consolidate duplicated snapshot-count helpers between roadmap and projection services.

phases.name: Final QA, Performance, and Launch Stabilization

tasks.title: Deploy release candidate to QA/staging environment
tasks.desc: After all implementation phases are complete and validated, deploy a release candidate to the QA/staging environment for final verification.

tasks.title: Reset QA database and run full step-by-step manual QA
tasks.desc: Reset the QA/staging database, start from a clean environment, and run the complete manual QA checklist across local-first, import/export, sharing, collaboration, controlled landing scroll, responsive workspace, accounts/workspaces, public sharing, rebrand, SEO, and self-hosting paths.

tasks.title: Run security review
tasks.desc: Run security-reviewer across auth, OAuth, sessions, share links, public slugs, rate limits, input validation, DB queries, CSP, and production config.

tasks.title: Run accessibility audit
tasks.desc: Audit keyboard navigation, focus order, modals, panels, inline editing, draft rows, filters, tags, login pages, color contrast, and screen-reader labels.

tasks.title: Run large-roadmap performance test
tasks.desc: Test 50 phases x up to 99 tasks per phase with filtering, autosync, collapse/expand, import preview, task claiming, and tag rendering.

tasks.title: Run Redis/multi-worker realtime regression
tasks.desc: Validate Redis event bus, tickets, locks, rate limiter, participant revocation, roadmap deletion, and multi-worker deployment mode.

tasks.title: Run import/merge destructive-data QA
tasks.desc: Test partner export/import scenarios where one user adds tasks while another marks tasks done, verifying progress is preserved unless explicitly changed.

tasks.title: Run accountless and self-hosted verification
tasks.desc: Verify Roadmaps still works fully without login and that self-hosted mode does not require central Anvilary auth.

tasks.title: Log and fix final QA blockers as focused slices
tasks.desc: After the full manual QA pass, log every blocker and fix each as a focused validated slice. Avoid unrelated polish unless it blocks release quality.

tasks.title: Run final go/no-go architecture audit
tasks.desc: Run final audits across product UX, backend persistence, security, SEO, accessibility, docs, and release hygiene.

tasks.title: Tag v0.1 release
tasks.desc: Create the v0.1 release tag only after all gates, audits, docs, and deployment checks pass.

tasks.title: Publish hosted Anvilary Roadmaps and portfolio entry
tasks.desc: Publish the hosted app, screenshots, demo media, portfolio case study, and Anvilary ecosystem positioning after the design handoff and release checks pass.

tasks.title: Add Markdown and PDF exports
tasks.desc: Implement polished Markdown/PDF exports after core JSON import/merge and SEO/product launch flows are stable.

tasks.title: Add saved filter views for account/workspace users
tasks.desc: Allow logged-in users or teams to save named filter views after FilterState and account/workspace foundations are stable.

tasks.title: Add roadmap duplication/fork flow
tasks.desc: Let users duplicate public/community roadmaps into their own local or account workspace.

tasks.title: Add advanced field-level conflict resolution
tasks.desc: Extend merge/conflict UX beyond import into live collaboration with selected per-field conflict choices.

tasks.title: Add richer activity filters and dense audit view
tasks.desc: Improve Activity panel filtering by actor/action/entity/date and add dense activity mode for teams.

tasks.title: Explore workspace billing/limits model
tasks.desc: If Anvilary Cloud gains traction, design hosted limits, team plans, and source-available/self-hosted boundaries.

tasks.title: Explore RoadForge MCP server for assistant workflows
tasks.desc: Explore a RoadForge MCP server that lets trusted assistant tools list roadmaps, read roadmap context, inspect current/recommended tasks, and prepare implementation prompts without exposing secrets or bypassing user approval.

tasks.title: Prototype assistant-safe roadmap read and task update tools
tasks.desc: Prototype a limited assistant integration with explicit read/update tools, scoped permissions, and audit-friendly behavior. Focus on safe project-copilot workflows rather than automatic broad code generation.
